title: ジャパンカップにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Japan Cup. Grass Wonder
learns that both she and Maruzensky are
predicted to earn places in the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The prospect of finally facing the Beast in a
decisive showdown looms large in her mind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just before the race, Grass Wonder runs into El
Condor Pasa. Determined to prove that she is the
more worthy successor to the Beast, she
accompanies her rival to the track.
